# Test Plans

<!-- Framework default template. The ## headings below are the required
     sections the required-sections sensor checks. A team override at
     aidlc/spaces/<space>/memory/templates/test-plans.md wins. -->

## Plans

One plan per test; a plan may serve several assumptions-record entries, and
each still gets its own verdict. Each plan names the assumptions it serves
and lists its composed steps, each step naming its primitive move
(Investigate, Walkthrough, Build, Run, Show) and its mark (runs-alone or
needs-a-person), with pass and fail stated before anything runs. A plan that
builds or shows works from the future-state option under test, rendered with
the design-language-record's components where one exists; a plan that
investigates starts from what the current-state picture already establishes.

## Step artifacts

What the steps produced, appended as they land — findings notes, journey
records, build manifests, run records, showing records.

## Recaps

One per cycle: what ran, what was learned, what changed, the verdicts, and
the artifact disposition.
